T.57 DevOps Agent — Complete Walkthrough

Everything built from scratch in /Users/chellasuganesh/X.1/devops-agent.

Phase 1: Project Scaffolding

Created a Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4 + TypeScript app using create-next-app:

npx -y create-next-app@latest devops-agent/ --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --use-npm --yes

Files created: package.json, tsconfig.json, postcss.config.mjs, next.config.ts, eslint.config.mjs

Phase 2: Original UI — Cyberpunk Neon Theme

globals.css

Set up Tailwind v4 with a custom neon cyberpunk theme (abyss, electric, critical, perfect colors), neon shadows, and utility classes like .glass-panel.

layout.tsx

Root layout with Inter font, SEO metadata for "DevOps Agent".

page.tsx

Landing page with:

  • Hero section and animated gradient border on input
  • Neon-blue submit button with hover glow
  • Loading overlay with pulsing rings
  • Error state display

Dashboard.tsx

Results dashboard with:

  • Circular SVG health score ring (color-coded)
  • Issue cards grid with severity-based highlights
  • Recommendations section

route.ts

API proxy route that forwards POST requests to FastAPI backend. Includes mock data fallback so the frontend works even without the backend running.

Phase 3: FastAPI Backend

main.py

FastAPI app with:

  • CORS middleware allowing localhost:3000
  • Pydantic models: AnalyzeRequest, Issue, AnalysisResult
  • /fetch-repo endpoint — fetches GitHub file tree
  • /analyze endpoint — orchestrates all 3 agents concurrently via asyncio.gather

agents.py

Three AI agents, each with an LLM system prompt + rule-based fallback:

AgentFocusWeight
SecuritySQL injection, hardcoded secrets, eval/exec, vulnerable deps40%
QualityCyclomatic complexity, long functions, code smells, nesting35%
DocsREADME quality, docstrings, inline comments25%

merge_agent_results() combines outputs into a weighted overall score + sorted issues + auto-generated recommendations.

github_client.py

GitHub API integration:

  • Parses owner/repo from any GitHub URL
  • Fetches recursive file tree via REST API
  • Filters for relevant extensions (.py, .js, .ts, README, etc.)
  • Respects file size + count limits

requirements.txt

fastapi, uvicorn, requests, pydantic, openai, python-dotenv

Phase 4: Demo Repository

Created intentionally vulnerable code in demo-app/:

FileIssues
vulnerable.pySQL injection, hardcoded API_KEY + password, eval()/exec(), debug mode
big_function.js200+ line function, 6+ levels of nesting, zero comments
README.mdOnly 3 lines — intentionally bare

Phase 5: Vintage Street Art Redesign

Completely replaced the neon cyberpunk look with a monotone vintage + Gen Z street art aesthetic.

globals.css — Rewritten

  • Monotone palette: charcoal #1A1A1A, chalk #E8E8E8, faded #999999, aged paper #E0DDD5
  • Film grain overlay via animated CSS noise SVG
  • 6 custom animations:
AnimationEffect
glitchText jitter + skew distortion
spray-revealBlur 20→0 (spray paint appearing)
sticker-peelRotateY 90→0 (sticker slapping on wall)
dripGravity translateY (paint dripping)
tag-flickerOpacity flicker (dying neon sign)
grainAnimated noise position
  • New utility classes: .sticker-panel, .stencil-input, .severity-tag, .handwritten, .stencil-text

layout.tsx — Updated fonts

  • Anton — heavy condensed stencil font for headings
  • Space Mono — monospace body font

page.tsx — Redesigned

  • Stencil graffiti headings: "ANALYZE / SECURE / SHIP IT"
  • Glitch animation on "ANALYZE"
  • Dashed stencil input box
  • Sticker-peel feature tags (SECURITY, QUALITY, DOCS)
  • Spray-paint loading screen
  • Brick grid background

Phase 6: Full-Stack Integration — Per-Agent Scores

Updated the entire stack so the frontend displays individual agent scores, not just an overall number.

Backend changes

  • AnalysisResult model now returns: overall_score, security_score, quality_score, docs_score
  • merge_agent_results() passes through each agent's individual score

Frontend changes

  • AnalysisResult TypeScript interface updated with 4 score fields
  • API route mock data updated to include per-agent scores
  • Dashboard now renders 4 health rings in a row

Dashboard with 4 per-agent score rings: Overall 42, Security 25, Quality 45, Docs 60

Phase 7: Team Repo + Collaboration

Created collaboration files:

  • README.md — Project overview, quick start, architecture, tech stack, git workflow
  • CONTRIBUTING.md — Setup guide, branch naming, commit conventions, PR process
  • .env.example — Template with OPENAI_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN, BACKEND_URL

Pushed to team repo

git init

git add -A


git commit -m "feat: T.57 DevOps Agent — multi-agent AI repo analyzer with vintage street art UI"


git remote add origin https://github.com/Xeyrill/T.57.git


git push -u origin main

Live at: github.com/Xeyrill/T.57

Full Flow Recording

[Complete interaction: landing → scanning → dashboard]

[Per-agent scores integration flow]

How to Run

# Clone

git clone https://github.com/Xeyrill/T.57.git && cd T.57/devops-agent



Frontend


npm install && npm run dev          # → http://localhost:3000



Backend (optional — mock data works without it)


cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt


uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
